data.content: Implemented immediate beat-list invalidation for direct user mutations and removed immediate list refresh from background session exits/scope refinement. Added regression coverage in src/lib/__tests__/beat-invalidation-consistency.test.ts and a Playwright smoke harness in scripts/test-beat-refresh-latency.{sh,mjs}. Validation passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, bash scripts/test-beat-refresh-latency.sh (create 327ms, update 28ms, background no immediate refresh). Branch: feat/foolery-1a2d-user-refresh-latency commit 178dcc92c795.
